case_title: PA BUILDERS, INC. VS. DE NGUYEN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY PA BUILDERS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, DE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-15-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO APR-04-2013 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ARTHUR ABEZGAUZ--DIRECTOR. NOT REPORTED. (506)
